Video.summary: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth ñ Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 12, Curacao (Part 1)

Video.summary: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can OíHagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 13, Curacao (Part 2)

Video.summary: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico

Video.summary: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)

Video.summary: After 11 months and 14 competitions all over the world, it all comes down to the final in this episode. The strongmen must show their best skills and every mistake is expensive, so their concentration must be at the highest possible level. Will Krzysztof manage to take off back or will Dainis maintain his lead?
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 16, Mexico - World Finals (Part 2)

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 16, Mexico - World Finals (Part 2)
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 16, Mexico - World Finals (Part 2)
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 16, Mexico - World Finals (Part 2)

Video.summary: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capita in the World and of course, the most powerful host in Strongman champions league on the planet. Itís a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2019 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.
Video.title: SCL S6 Ep2 FIBO Power

Video.summary: On a spectacular beach in Alanya, the MLO Strongman Champions League Turkey was viewed by thousands of spectators over a two day battle. With 12 athletes at the start over 6 cruel events, like Marble Stone Lift, Truckpull and Deadlift cars. And with the comeback of Travis Ortmayer / USA, former stone king and world ranked competitor. Winner of several SCL stages in the past.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 3, Turkey

Video.summary: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. Itís a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power

Video.summary: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean OíHagan (Ireland).
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 3, Abu Dhabi

Video.summary: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)

Video.summary: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on ìAir spaî for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 7, Serbia

Video.summary: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 8, Finland - U105 (Part 1)

Video.summary: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 9, Finland - U105 (Part 2)

Video.summary: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: ì The Chopper Pullî!
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 10, Romania (Part 1)

Video.summary: Four times Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the ìFlying Dutchmanî Kelvin de Ruiter competing here in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, and 3 in this episode: The first event, a truckpull of 17.000 kg over 25 meters in max 75 seconds, was a real hard pull Also for the World Champion Truckpull, Hollandís runner-up Kelvin de Ruiter, but watch his amazing technique here.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)

Video.summary: Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the ìFlying Dutchmanî Kelvin de Ruiter, competing in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, 3 in this second episode; a Viking-press of 150 kg with the current world record holder Luke Herrick. The fifth event, a front hold of 25 kg is loved or hated by the athletes and lastly, the Stones of Strength.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)

Video.summary: An unbelievable TANK PULL of 50.000 kg was at the stage of SCL RUSSIA. Never seen this before! Not only a tank pull was done here but also the Viking Press/ Deadlift Max and Log lift reps were spectacular events to see here in Russia. With Mikhail Koklyaev also as event presenter, the former top 3 world strongest man from Russia was there
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 6, Russia

Video.summary: In this yearís edition on The Balkan Peninsula, we have competing the new talent from Estonia Marko Remlik together with Sebastian Kurek from Poland and yellow leader Kelvin de Ruiter
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 7, Serbia

Video.summary: After three classical Strongman events ñ Dead lift, Loading and Front hold ñ and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title; Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 11, Romania (Part 2)

Video.summary: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. Weíll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking

Video.summary: Part 2 of the world final of the Strongman Champions League tour 2024 in Alanya, Turkey. With three Events down and amazing results. Who will be the new World champion?
Video.title: Stage 16 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 2

Video.summary: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)

Video.summary: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World ñ Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic ñ Aivars Smaukstelis
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 6, Finland

Video.summary: This year 14 athletes from all over the world came to Fefor to compete in 6 cruel events. We'll see typical Viking disciplines on very heavy conditions in land of snow and ice, World records and athletes like the title defender Krzysztof Radzikowski, strongest guys from Holland and Germany and many more
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 1, World Strongest Viking

Image.alt: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 1, World Strongest Viking
SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 1, World Strongest Viking
SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 1, World Strongest Viking

Video.summary: Mateusz Kieliszkowski from Poland and Aivars Smaukstelis from Latvia are the strongman future of these days. Mateusz is the best man in the World at the moment to defeat. Only 25 years and such a fantastic strongman. They come here only for a win. But there are 12 more Strong athletes in this episode who want the title of Finland as well.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)
